title: odontocarya klugii
intro: Odontocarya klugii, also known as the 'Guayusa Tree', is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, specifically in Ecuador. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Odontocarya klugii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting antioxidant defenses in the body. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, known as 'guayusa', by drying its leaves and infusing them in hot water, which is also rich in caffeine.
